# Skill Harness Agent Guidance

- Auto-detect model impact for engineering changes.
- Fresh developer-artifact setup uses `--modeling-mode auto`, resolving to UML-first for new repos and preserving existing repos.
- Canonical model sources live in repo-relative text files, usually `docs/artifacts/source/models/`.
- Keep `docs/artifacts/source/models/model-inventory.md` and `docs/artifacts/artifacts.manifest.json` aligned.
- Human model review artifacts are static HTML under `generated/review/models/`, generated by `node scripts/generate-model-review.mjs`.
- Product, business, data, research, UX, and mockup artifacts are visual-source-first: canonical agent-readable source under `docs/artifacts/source/<family>/`, generated human review under `generated/review/<family>/`.
- High-fidelity visual review is the default for UI, product, customer-facing workflow, and mockup artifacts; low-fidelity sketches are scratch unless explicitly captured as evidence.
- Keep synthetic user or agent-simulation evidence distinct from real user/customer evidence.
- Open generated HTML with the best available human surface: Codex Browser plugin in Codex app, Claude desktop preview/browser in Claude desktop, or `node scripts/open-artifact-review.mjs` for CLI/system-browser fallback.
- Validate with `node scripts/check-model-artifact-policy.mjs` and `node scripts/check-artifact-html-policy.mjs`.
- Public contribution and security guidance lives in `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SUPPORT.md`, `SECURITY.md`, and `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`.
